TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_tademaw-Song_Yun_Hua(Taiwan), title = tademaw-Song_Yun_Hua(Taiwan), year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/tademaw-Song_Yun_Hua(Taiwan)} }

S.FORM: == Song Yun Hua == u siwkay niza Song Yun Hua(1992.10.21), tatayna, Taywan a palaway. 2014 mipalaw tu iga<mitala cacay a tademaw cofi>, mamikuwan tu sakacacayay a tatayna angaangan. 2015 a mihca sa, mipalaw tu iga <u wawana a mihcaan>, mamikuwan tu sakacacayay a tatayna angangan. namacumud tu iga kawlah a sacabengan. masakapah henay ciniza itawya. sangulan sipunuay a tatayna ciniza. (amicunus henay tu sulit.ŚĺÖŤ£úŚÖÖ) u sapuyaay a kakuniza u kawaw niza u sulit nu Hulam Vivian Sung Yun-hua (ŚģčŤäłś®ļ; born 21 October 1992) is a Taiwanese actress, best known for the films Caf√©. Waiting. Love and Our Times. She was nominated for the Best Actress award at the 52nd Golden Horse Awards for her role as Lin Chen-hsin in Our Times. u sulit nu Korea žĎĻžúąŪôĒ(ž§ĎÍĶ≠žĖī: ŚģčŤäłś®ļ, Ž≥ĎžĚĆ: S√≤ng Y√ļnhu√†, ŪēúžěźžĚĆ: žÜ°žöīŪôĒ, žėĀžĖī: Vivian Sung ŽĻĄŽĻĄžĖł žĎĻ(*), 1992ŽÖĄ 10žõĒ 21žĚľ ~ )ŽäĒ ŪõĄŽ≥īžóź žė¨ŽěźŽč§. u iga niza (amicunus henay tu sulit.ŚĺÖŤ£úŚÖÖ) u uzip niza (amicunus henay tu sulit.ŚĺÖŤ£úŚÖÖ)
S.PHON: == soŇč jun ńßua == u siwkaj niza soŇč jun ńßua(****.**.**), tatajna, tajwan a par~…ĺawaj. **** mipar~…ĺaw tu iga<mitar~…ĺa ¶a ¶aj a tad…ômaw ¶ofi>, mamikuwan tu saka ¶a ¶ajaj a tatajna aŇčaaŇčan. **** a mińß ¶a sa, mipar~…ĺaw tu iga <u wawana a mińß ¶aan>, mamikuwan tu saka ¶a ¶ajaj a tatajna aŇčaŇčan. nama ¶umud tu iga kawr~…ĺańß a sa ¶ab…ôŇčan. masakapańß ńß…ônaj ¶iniza itawja. saŇčur~…ĺan sipunuaj a tatajna ¶iniza. (ami ¶unus ńß…ônaj tu sur~…ĺit.***) u sapujaaj a kakuniza u kawaw niza u sur~…ĺit nu ńßur~…ĺam *i*ian suŇč jun-ńßua (***; born ** o ¶tob…ôr ****) is a taiwan…ôs…ô a ¶tr…ôss, b…ôst known for tńß…ô fir~…ĺms ¶af*. waitiŇč. r~…ĺo*…ô and our tim…ôs. sńß…ô was nominat…ôd for tńß…ô b…ôst a ¶tr…ôss award at tńß…ô **nd gor~…ĺd…ôn ńßors…ô awards for ńß…ôr ror~…ĺ…ô as r~…ĺin ¶ńß…ôn-ńßsin in our tim…ôs. u sur~…ĺit nu kor…ôa ***(***: ***, **: s*Ňč j*nńßu*, ***: ***, **: *i*ian suŇč *** *(*), ***** *** *** ~ )* *** ***. u iga niza (ami ¶unus ńß…ônaj tu sur~…ĺit.***) u uzip niza (ami ¶unus ńß…ônaj tu sur~…ĺit.***)
S.FORM: == Song Yun Hua == u siwkay niza Song Yun Hua(1992.10.21), tatayna, Taywan a palaway. 2014 mipalaw tu iga<mitala cacay a tademaw cofi>, mamikuwan tu sakacacayay a tatayna angaangan. 2015 a mihca sa, mipalaw tu iga <u wawana a mihcaan>, mamikuwan tu sakacacayay a tatayna angangan. namacumud tu iga kawlah a sacabengan. masakapah henay ciniza itawya. sangulan sipunuay a tatayna ciniza. Waiting. Love and Our Times.
